  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "gabt/ ka ta Sivehdeena fvchtita
taptu. Ir eekſch ta peemininni
mannis/ mans Deewß! un faun-
dſi mannis pehz tawas leelas
Scheblastibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es eerandſju arri tannis
Deenas Schihdus/ kas Asdodi-
teru/ Ammoniteru/ un Moabi-
teru Seewas bij apjehmuschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winnu Behrni run-
naja puſs Asdoditiſki/ un ne fin-
naja Schihdiſki runnaht / bet
pehz ikkatras Tantas WalloDaß.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad bahrohs es ar teem/
un lamuaju tohs/ un kuhln kab-
dus Wihrus wo teem/ un ispluh-
zu teem tohs Mattus/ un likke
tohs pee Deewa swebreht; Jums
ne buhs juhtas Meitas winnu
Dehleem doht/ nedß preekſch juh-
jeem Dehleem/ nedß preekſch ſew
paſcheem no winnu Meitahm
xeint.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne irr Salamans/ tas
Israëta Kehninsch tadeht greh-
tojs? jeptchu ſtarp dauds Tau-
tahm tahds Kehninsch ne bija/
tahds winſch bija/ un winſch bi-
ja ſawaim Deewam mihtſch/ un
Deetos bij winnu par Kehnizu
pahr wiſtu Israëlu eezehtis; Un
tomehr ir tahdu darrija tahs ſwe-
schas Seewas/ ka ir tas apgrehy-
kojahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ar tad mehs juhs klaun-
tiſim/ tas juhs wiſfu ſcho leeſu
Laununu darrat / noseegda-
mees prett muhfu Deewu/ ka
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weens no Jojadus Be-
neem/ ta Dehla Elijasiba/ ta a-
ſta Preesteru/ bija arri Saneb
latam tam Oroniteram .
Snohtu tappis/ tapehz iſdin
es winnu no mannim nohſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Peeminini winnu/ ma
Deetws! tapehz ka tee to fweh
Preesteru-Ammatu irr ſagahu-
ſchi/ un to Derribu ta fweh
Preesteru-Ammata/ un to &
witu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta tchſibſtiju es tohs
wiſfadeeni Swetchineekern / u-
es eezehtu tahs Sargaschanas
Preestern/ un to Lewitu/ itkat-
uhs ſawu Weetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir uhs to MalkasUppi-
ru ſawds Laikds / un uhs tee-
Pirmajeem. Peeminini mannie-
mans Deetws! par Labbu.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
